current_status_artifacts: advanced_spine_contracts.py validates source-layer intake, rig layout, mesh/weights/deform, constraints/IK/transform/path, clipping, events/runtime triggers, and production export readiness.
config/h5g_source_layer_contract.json defines accepted source inputs, layer names, Spine PSD tags, pivots, origins, z-order bands, and review gates.
config/h5g_advanced_spine_policy.json defines mesh budgets, max bone influences, deform safety rules, constraint limits, clipping rules, event namespaces, and runtime listener gates.
config/h5g_production_export_profile.json defines the H5G/V10 review profile, atlas settings, editor/runtime version gates, CLI/license gates, and production write policy.
generated/advanced_spine_contracts/advanced_spine_contract_validation.{json,md} is the generated proof report for the current workspace state.

blocked_or_review_gated: generated source-layer candidates still require H5G/Christian approval before becoming fixtures;
exact handling for unsupported Photoshop features must be confirmed per fixture;
AI decomposition remains review-only and cannot be accepted without hidden-part/hallucination review.
ready_or_concrete: accepted source types are explicit: PSD/PSB, Spine Import PSD, and reviewed transparent PNG layers;
flat single renders and unapproved AI decomposition are disallowed;
layer name regexes, allowed Spine PSD tags, required origin, pivots, z-order policy, and reviewer gates are machine-readable.
source_layer_inventory.py now generates a bounded, read-only candidate inventory and review-required source_layer_manifest.json under generated/source_layer_inventory/.
source_layer_manifest.py now resolves the live manifest into compiler-facing candidates and gates PSD/PSB rows as extraction/review-required.
app/local_proof_ui.py now exposes a separate source-layer selector that runs layered_rig_compiler.py only for existing PNG folders.

blocked_or_review_gated: production slot, skin, attachment path, and H5G runtime naming conventions need final approval;
PSD tag import must be tested against real Christian PSDs before production promotion.
current manifest-connected layered-rig output is proof-only and still inherits each manifest row's candidate_review_required approval status.
ready_or_concrete: layered_rig_compiler.py validates part files, pivots, z-order, parent bones, atlas/attachment coverage, V10 linear timelines, and now advanced feature absence.

blocked_or_review_gated: no production mesh topology generation exists;
no automatic weights, linked mesh inheritance, or deform timeline authoring is production-approved;
one controlled reviewed mesh fixture should be built before generalizing.
ready_or_concrete: max mesh vertices, total mesh vertices, max bone influences per vertex, pruning threshold, deform review requirements, and topology-regeneration bans are explicit;
tests reject unsafe deform enablement and budget violations.

blocked_or_review_gated: no production constraint authoring is enabled;
one character-like or symbol-like controlled IK fixture is needed before compiler support.
ready_or_concrete: allowed constraint types, max IK chain length, mix range, order review, and skin membership review are explicit;
tests reject unsafe IK chain length, bad mix values, and missing target bones.

blocked_or_review_gated: production clipping authoring remains disabled until runtime CPU budgets and slot-range use cases are approved.
ready_or_concrete: max clipping polygon vertices, max slot span, no self-intersection, no overlapping clip ranges, and CPU budget review are explicit;
tests reject self-intersecting and oversized clipping cases.

blocked_or_review_gated: H5G runtime listener owner, payload semantics, audio/VFX/gameplay dispatch behavior, and acceptance tests are not assigned.
ready_or_concrete: event namespaces are fixed to h5g.symbol, h5g.ui, h5g.audio, and h5g.vfx;
tests reject events outside those namespaces.

blocked_or_review_gated: exact runtime version and editor export version are not selected;
Spine CLI/editor license approval is not confirmed;
runtime acceptance tests have not passed;
Perforce and G:/artSource writes remain disabled.
ready_or_concrete: target runtime/editor major-minor compatibility, atlas settings, data export policy, CLI dry-run posture, license gate, runtime test gate, and production write policy are machine-readable.

next_production_steps: Review and approve selected rows from generated/source_layer_inventory/source_layer_manifest.json, starting with PNG-folder proof outputs such as generated/source_layer_fixture_runs/manifest_4000_buffalo_images/.
Assign the runtime owner for event listener namespaces and payload handling.
Confirm exact H5G Spine runtime/editor export versions and license posture.
Build one reviewed mesh/weights/deform fixture and one reviewed constraint fixture.
Enable clipping only after a measured runtime CPU budget and slot-range design.
Keep production export disabled until runtime acceptance tests pass and the manual Perforce workflow is approved.

family_findings: hp_symbol: 304 results, 65 real comparisons; largest gaps are slot_attachment, scale, rotate, translate, slot_color, and deform.
bonus_symbol: 1962 results, 630 real comparisons; largest gaps are slot_attachment, scale, rotate, translate, and slot_color.
lp_symbol: 5 real comparisons; largest gaps are slot_attachment, scale, rotate, translate, and slot_color.
value_symbol: 2 real comparisons; largest gaps include slot_color, slot_attachment, translate, rotate, scale, and slot_twoColor.
scatter_symbol: reference-only; human evidence exists, but no generated candidate was selected.
UI/system buckets including interface_ambients, interface_popups, overlay/panel/popup, reel/row/grid, and vfx_only remain reference-only or unavailable.
focused_validation_runs: closure_compiler_upgrade_smoke_20260507: proof defaults plus source-layer candidates; 18 candidates, 17 comparisons, 0 failures.
closure_compiler_upgrade_smoke_exact_20260507: exact/local gate report separating aggregate advisory counts.
closure_attachment_alias_smoke_20260507: proof attachment-alias smoke; 3 candidates, 2 comparisons, 0 failures.
closure_motion_profile_seed_20260507: writes research/generated/compiler_motion_profiles/latest_exact_motion_profile.json from exact local reference motion ranges.
closure_sequence_motion_smoke_20260507: source/proof smoke with exact motion profile available to compilers; 18 candidates, 17 comparisons, 0 failures.
closure_hp_sequence_real_smoke_20260507: real HP source-layer smoke proving numbered PNG frame runs compile as timed attachment swaps; 8 candidates, 8 comparisons, 0 failures.
next_critical_path: Run a focused full deep bakeoff against the rebuilt Santa Pop layered_loops batch to materialize the new exact-local missing counts and refresh latest_exact_motion_profile.json.
Expand true source/VFX frame-sequence grouping beyond detected numbered PNG runs.
Promote UI/system reference-only buckets into generated candidates where deterministic templates exist.
Keep mesh/deform, clipping, IK, and production export behind explicit review gates.

LP1/LP1_original -> generic_part (0.12): exact sidecar slot/attachment match; bakeoff placement quality: source_sidecar_used_strong; generated rig currently parents to _rig
SF1/SF1_box -> generic_part (0.12): exact sidecar slot/attachment match; bakeoff placement quality: source_sidecar_used_strong; generated rig currently parents to _rig

recommended_next_compiler_changes: Accept contextual parent_map and pivot_map overrides during manifest intake before layered_rig_compiler builds bones.
Create semantic bones for body/head/left_arm/right_arm/frame/text instead of parenting all parts to _rig.
Map inferred effect layers to additive slots and shimmer/text_sheen/frame_pulse timelines.
Use inferred animation_uses to choose recipe-specific HP/LP/JP/BO/WD/WY/SF actions instead of generic proof pulses.
Surface low-confidence and symbol-level-only sidecar matches in the UI for animator review before compile.

notes: Corpus counts come only from promoted full-corpus recipe categories where available.
Compiler support is separated from one-click GUI readiness; manual proof recipes can exist without one-click corpus rows.
Proof-ready does not mean production-ready; it means deterministic proof compilation and smoke validation exist.
No Perforce, artSource, or credential paths are read beyond the listed generated evidence files.

source_policy.rule: Read only existing documented/generated H5G research outputs; never inspect artSource or write Perforce.

limitations: This is deterministic name/path/tag/role-map classification, not image inspection.
UI/system records with generic VFX names remain review-gated as unknown_ui_or_system or vfx_only.
Counts are based on existing generated evidence only; this script does not touch Perforce or G:\artSource.
